title: Self-Perception Study Protocol
author: Hunter Duval
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bavwie7e

steps.title: Choose Population — Be sure to...
steps.instruction: Choose Population — Be sure to choose an unbiased population, meaning do not choose a population that is known for being over or under-confident.

steps.title: Set Up Questions — What are...
steps.instruction: Set Up Questions — What are the subjects going to be asked? How will these questions pertain to the experiment?

steps.title: Collect Data — Ask the population...
steps.instruction: Collect Data — Ask the population the selected questions and record their responses; OR have the population take a survey with the selected questions.

steps.title: Analyse Data — What do the numbers mean
steps.instruction: Analyse Data — What do the numbers mean? How much of a certain sub-population perceive themselves as attractive?
